first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (3/10) and identify the same critical disqualifier: the candidate's 'Basic' German proficiency does not meet the C1 requirement. The lists of strengths and concerns are also functionally the same, with minor differences in wording (e.g., 'Exceptional technical breadth' vs. 'Extensive and diverse... experience') that fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a change in the core assessment.
